name: Benefits Cards
description: Repeatable card grid with icon, title, and description per card. Uses param_group for dynamic item count.

params.heading: Section Subtext
params.default: Everything you need to build faster, smarter, and more reliably.

default.title: Lightning Fast
default.description: Optimized for speed with lazy loading and minimal overhead.

default.title: Enterprise Security
default.description: Bank-grade encryption and regular security audits keep your data safe.

default.title: Easy to Use
default.description: Intuitive interface that anyone on your team can learn in minutes.

default.title: All-in-One Platform
default.description: Everything you need in a single dashboard — no extra plugins required.

params.heading: Icon
params.description: Emoji or short text for the card icon.

params.heading: Card Description
params.default: A short description of this benefit or feature.
